title: Gumira villosa

Its leaves are said to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which help alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. The plant is also used to treat digestive problems, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its purported ability to balance gut bacteria. Further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of Gumira villosa for medicinal purposes.
